description: Dean Little discusses writing optimized Solana programs, focusing on compute, storage, and data efficiency. He emphasizes capital efficiency and the trade-offs in optimization strategies. The talk includes practical tips for improving program efficiency and highlights frameworks like Pinocchio.
topic_summary: Dean Little presents on optimizing Solana programs, covering key aspects such as compute consumption, storage costs, and data management. He discusses the importance of capital efficiency and shares insights on practical optimizations and frameworks like Pinocchio [t=0:08 - t=2:30].
